Description: Event arguments for the Lottie player loaded event.

PublicProperties.Name: Type
PublicProperties.Description: Gets the ID of the event.

PublicProperties.Name: CurrentTime
PublicProperties.Description: Gets the current frame of the animation as a zero-based index.

PublicProperties.Name: TotalTime
PublicProperties.Description: Gets the total number of frames to be processed.

PublicProperties.Name: Direction
PublicProperties.Description: The current direction of the Lottie animation playback.
